generated_exposure.exposure_text: As someone who values both safety and personal freedom, I've been really concerned about the recent debate on domestic security powers. My friend Sarah, who works in emergency response, told me how new surveillance tools helped stop a potential attack last year. It's not about giving up liberties - it's about having the right tools to keep us all safe. We can't afford to be naive about security in today's world. #SafetyFirst #BalancedSecurity
